title: Protocol for DNA extraction from clay-rich subsoils
author: Lukas Beule
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bhmjj44n

steps.title: Weigh in 200 ± 5 mg...
steps.instruction: Weigh in 200 ± 5 mg freeze-dried soil into a 2-mL tube.

steps.title: Homogenize the sample by bead beating...
steps.instruction: Homogenize the sample by bead beating using 3 tungsten carbide beads (ø 3 mm) for 1 min at 25 Hz using a swing mill (e.g. MM 400, Retsch, Germany).

steps.title: Add 250 µL PB buffer1 with 0
steps.instruction: Add 250 µL PB buffer1 with 0.5% SDS (w/v) and vortex for 10 sec at max speed.

steps.title: Incubate the suspension at 65°C for...
steps.instruction: Incubate the suspension at 65°C for 10 min and shake the samples every 60 sec for 5 sec.

steps.title: Centrifuge for 1 min at 10,000...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge for 1 min at 10,000 rpm and transfer 90 µL of the supernatant into a new 2-mL tube (supernatant will contain bubbles).

steps.title: Add 810 µL ddH2O (1:10 dilution)...
steps.instruction: Add 810 µL ddH2O (1:10 dilution) and subsequently 900 µL phenol2 and shake the samples briefly.

steps.title: Centrifuge for 10 min at 10,000...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge for 10 min at 10,000 rpm and transfer 800 µL of the upper phase into a new 2-mL tube.

steps.title: Add 800 µL chloroform:isoamylalcohol (24:1 (v/v)),...
steps.instruction: Add 800 µL chloroform:isoamylalcohol (24:1 (v/v)), incubate 10 min on ice and centrifuge for 10 min at 10,000 rpm.

steps.title: Transfer 700 µL of the upper...
steps.instruction: Transfer 700 µL of the upper phase into a new 1.5 mL-tube.

steps.title: Add 700 µL chloroform:isoamylalcohol (24:1), incubate...
steps.instruction: Add 700 µL chloroform:isoamylalcohol (24:1), incubate 10 min on ice and centrifuge for 10 min at 10,000 rpm.

steps.title: Transfer 600 µL of the upper...
steps.instruction: Transfer 600 µL of the upper phase into a new 1.5 mL-tube containing 200 µL 30% PEG 6000 and 100 µL 5M NaCl.

steps.title: Shake the mixture and incubate at...
steps.instruction: Shake the mixture and incubate at room temperature for 20 min.

steps.title: Centrifuge for 15 min at max
steps.instruction: Centrifuge for 15 min at max. speed.

steps.title: Wash the pellet with 500 µL...
steps.instruction: Wash the pellet with 500 µL 80% EtOH (v/v) twice and centrifuge for 5 min at max speed in-between each washing before discarding the supernatant. Supernatant should be removed by pipetting.

steps.title: Dry the pellet using vacuum centrifugation...
steps.instruction: Dry the pellet using vacuum centrifugation at 30°C for 20 minutes or until it is dry under a sterile bench.

steps.title: Add 50 µL TE buffer, vortex...
steps.instruction: Add 50 µL TE buffer, vortex or flick the samples to release the pellet from the tube wall and incubate at 42°C for 2h (e.g. in a water bath). Notes addressing the solutions: 1 PB buffer: 1 M Na2HPO4 and 1 M NaH2PO4, blended to achieve pH 7.2.2 Phenol: redistilled, in TE buffer equilibrated, pH 7.5 to 8.0

steps.title: This protocol is the Supplementary File...
steps.instruction: This protocol is the Supplementary File S1 of Guerra et al., Microorganisms 2020, 8 (4), 532; https://doi.org/10.3390/microorganisms8040532 please cite as Guerra et al. (2020) Microorganisms , 8 (4), 532.
